data.name: UnHolY PraYeR
data.detailed_description:
■故事

費爾岑斯坦邊境伯爵的領地……這裡受到黑暗魔物的侵害日益嚴重。

王國教會對事態感到憂慮，命令兩名驅魔師調查原因。

其中之一瑪麗安妮手持她最愛的鎖鞭，踏入了那片土地。

■遊戲說明

這是一款正統的橫向捲軸動作遊戲。

玩家將操作主角瑪麗安妮，擊退襲來的敵人，並與襲擊費爾岑斯坦領地的災難作鬥爭。

・任務選擇

瑪麗安妮等人會收到來自費爾岑斯坦各地的各種委託。

玩家可以任意選擇任務，通過完成任務來推進故事的發展。

完成某些任務可能會對後面的故事產生影響……？

・技能與道具

本遊戲沒有所謂的等級概念。

相反，任務中可以使用 4 種技能，並在一定成本範圍內攜帶道具。

如果任務難以完成，可以根據敵人的情況調整技能和道具，這樣戰鬥可能會變得更輕鬆。

・技能與道具

本遊戲沒有所謂的等級概念。

相反，任務中可以使用 4 種技能，並在一定成本範圍內攜帶道具。

如果任務難以完成，可以根據敵人的情況調整技能和道具，這樣戰鬥可能會變得更輕鬆。
data.short_description: 侵蝕邊境之地的黑暗魔物們……美麗的驅魔師為了拯救人民，前往那片土地。
data.supported_languages:
英文, 簡體中文, 繁體中文, 日文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows11, Windows10
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體

data.name: UnHolY PraYeR
data.detailed_description:
■Story

The borderlands of the Ferzenstein Marquisate... Here, the damage caused by dark monsters was rapidly increasing.

The Royal Church, concerned about the situation, ordered two exorcists to investigate the cause.

One of them, Marianne, armed with her trusty chain whip, sets foot in that land.

■Game Description

This is a full-fledged side-scrolling action game.

Control the protagonist Marianne and defeat the enemies that attack you as you face the disaster that is ravaging the Felsenstein territory.

・Quest Selection

Various people living in the Felsenstein territory will come to Marianne and her companions with requests.

Players can choose any request and advance the story by clearing it.

Some cleared quests may affect the later story... ?

• Skills and Items

This game does not have the concept of levels.

Instead, quests allow you to bring four skills and items within a certain cost limit.

If a quest is difficult to clear, adjusting your skills and items to match the enemies may make the battle easier.

data.short_description: Dark monsters are invading the remote lands... The beautiful exorcist goes there to save the people.
data.supported_languages:
English, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Japanese*
*languages with full audio support
